name: Valendine
bio:
Assassin of the "Scarlet Phantom" who failed in challenging Dracula. He was ordered to hunt demons to gain a second chance to fight. Wearing a tattered cloak, he fights with claw gauntlets and a musket.

Role: Physical Execute
Specialty: A mid-backline Blitz-type hero that can continuously execute low-HP targets; has self-damage reduction ability.

skillSlots.name: Phantom Raid
skillSlots.description: Attacks column of enemy with lowest DEF, dealing total 300% P.DMG (single target max 2.5x Caster's ATK).

skillSlots.name: Hellish Flash Kill
skillSlots.description: Attacks enemy with lowest DEF 3 times, dealing 140% P.DMG per hit. If target is killed, attacks enemy with lowest HP again (DMG halved). Cannot trigger other Pursuit/Combo Effects.

effects.name: Last-hitting Habit
effects.description: When Ultimate leaves target below 15% HP, [Executes] target (ignores Shield/DEF/Damage Share, max 300% ATK).

effects.name: Last-hitting Habit
effects.description: When [Execute] triggers, recovers HP equal to 100% ATK and dispels 2 Debuffs from self.

effects.name: Last-hitting Habit
effects.description: [Hellish Instant Kill] deals additional P.DMG equal to 5% of [Bleed] target's lost HP (max 1x ATK).

effects.name: Last-hitting Habit
effects.description: [Execute] trigger condition increased to 25% target HP (ignores Shield/DEF/Damage Share, max 500% ATK).
